name: Fried Tomatoes with Gravy
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut tomatoes into 1/2 inch slices.
2. Dredge the tomato slices in 1/4 cup flour.
3. Melt 1/4 cup butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
4. Add the tomato slices and cook until golden brown, turning once.
5. Arrange the cooked tomatoes on a serving platter.
6. Sprinkle with salt, pepper, and brown sugar.
7. Keep warm.
8. Melt the remaining 2 tablespoons butter in the pan drippings.
9. Add the remaining 2 tablespoons flour and stir until smooth.
10. Cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
11. Gradually add milk and cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until thickened.
12. Spoon the gravy over the tomatoes and serve immediately.
Yield: 6 to 8 servings.
